## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Verification

List the tests and checks you ran.

## Contributor checklist

- [ ] I have read `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- [ ] I have the right and authority to submit this Contribution.
- [ ] I have signed the ArchiCode Individual CLA through the designated signing
      service, and my employer has completed the Corporate CLA if required.
- [ ] I identified third-party code, assets, generated material, and applicable
      licenses in this pull request.
- [ ] I added or updated tests and documentation where appropriate.
- [ ] I did not include credentials, personal data, local runtime output, or
      unintended generated artifacts.

The checklist records the contributor's representations but is not itself the
CLA signature. The repository's CLA status check must pass before merge.
